{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Mister Marten
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Mister Marten]] is one of the individuals Fitch is addressing regarding a network of information.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c2">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
